name: recall_xrdp_session_maps_ac17
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 01.AC/: a script(1) capture of `systemctl status xrdp` and the TLS crypto-level config. Remote access session (RDP into the VM) with TLS protection is AC-17 (Remote Access). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; xrdp config vocabulary ('crypt_level=high', 'ssl_protocols=TLSv1.2', 'security_layer=tls') has near-zero overlap with 'remote access'. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor SC-8 (transmission confidentiality) present as precision guard — the file documents remote access, with TLS as a sub-attribute, not standalone transmission-protection evidence.

objectives.text: The information system monitors and controls remote access methods and authorizes remote access to the information system prior to allowing such connections.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Authorize and protect remote access sessions.

objectives.text: The information system protects the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.

evidence.title: xrdp remote session capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-10 15:40:00-0500
[root@app01 ~]# systemctl status xrdp --no-pager
  xrdp.service - xrdp daemon
     Active: active (running) since Fri 2026-03-06 07:01:11 EST
[root@app01 ~]# grep -E 'crypt_level|security_layer|ssl_protocols' /etc/xrdp/xrdp.ini
crypt_level=high
security_layer=tls
ssl_protocols=TLSv1.2, TLSv1.3
[root@app01 ~]# ss -tlnp | grep 3389
LISTEN 0 2 0.0.0.0:3389 0.0.0.0:* users:(("xrdp",pid=1422,fd=11))
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-10 15:40:47-0500
